message: Released v0.1.8 and live-validated real panel/node subscription apply for vmess-tcp, shadowsocks-native, socks5, and http-proxy with no unresolved clientsRef and external TCP reachability.

Released v0.1.9 and live-validated real panel/node subscription apply for vless-tcp, vless-tcp-tls, vless-reality, trojan-tcp-tls, and trojan-tcp-reality with concrete Xray TLS/Reality config, no clientsRef, running Xray, and external TCP reachability.

Released managed Hysteria2/TUIC node runtime, fixed Alpine sing-box execution with gcompat, deployed pinned GHCR digest to the real node, and live-validated hysteria2 and tuic-v5 apply/render paths with managed sing-box processes, UDP listeners on 18454/18455, no clientsRef, and raw-uri/happ/sing-box subscription outputs.

Released v0.1.12/v0.1.13 through official GHCR and signed installer pipeline, deployed pinned node-agent v0.1.13 to the real node, live-validated wireguard-native apply/render path with wg-quick-managed lumen-wg interface listening on UDP 18460, real peer, and non-empty raw-uri/happ .conf plus sing-box wireguard output.

Released v0.1.15 through official GHCR and signed installer pipeline, installed real AmneziaWG host/module support on the live node, deployed pinned node-agent image with awg/awg-quick, and live-validated wireguard-amneziawg apply/render path with awg-managed lumen-wg listening on UDP 18461, real peer, preserved AWG fields, native raw/Happ .conf output, lumen-json renderer hints, and Android remote subscription smoke test against the real prod lumen-json.

Released v0.1.16 through official GHCR and signed installer pipeline, fixed public install-node reinstall behavior for an existing token file, reinstalled the live node-agent through the public installer with the pinned v0.1.16 digest, and live-validated hysteria2-obfs with a real profile/subscription/apply path: node managed sing-box Hysteria2 config has obfs salamander, one concrete user, UDP 18462 listener, Happ/raw/sing-box/Mihomo/lumen-json subscription outputs include obfs fields, and Android remote subscription smoke test against the real prod lumen-json passed.

Released v0.1.19 through official GHCR and signed installer pipeline, deployed panel images via the public release manifest and reinstalled the live node-agent through public install-node.sh with the pinned v0.1.19 digest. Live-validated the real vless-xhttp-tls profile/subscription/apply path on the real node: Xray listens on TCP 18466 with network=xhttp, tls, xhttpSettings path=/xhttp mode=auto, one concrete client, Happ and Mihomo outputs contain XHTTP path data, xray-json and amnezia outputs parse as valid JSON with xhttpSettings, sing-box no longer emits a fake unsupported VLESS/XHTTP outbound, and Android remote subscription smoke against the real prod lumen-json passed.

Live-validated VMess/Trojan Xray transport variants through the real panel API, active subscription, node-agent outbound.apply command path, and public subscription renderers. Profiles vmess-ws-tls:18467, vmess-grpc-tls:18468, vmess-httpupgrade-tls:18469, trojan-ws-tls:18470, trojan-grpc-tls:18471, and trojan-xhttp-tls:18472 each produced succeeded apply commands, external TCP reachability, matching xray-json stream network/settings, Happ/Mihomo render output, and non-fake sing-box behavior. Final live node state is trojan-xhttp-tls on TCP 18472 with Xray xhttpSettings path=/trojan-xhttp and one concrete subscription client; Android remote subscription smoke against the real prod lumen-json passed.

Released v0.1.21 through official GHCR and signed installer pipeline, pushed public node installer env support, reinstalled the live node-agent through public install-node.sh with the pinned v0.1.21 digest, and live-validated shadowsocks-2022 through the real panel API, active subscription, and node-agent outbound.apply path. The command succeeded, TCP 18473 was externally reachable, node sing-box runtime config had a real Shadowsocks 2022 inbound with method 2022-blake3-aes-128-gcm and no unresolved refs, public renderers returned Happ/raw, sing-box, Mihomo, Xray JSON, and Amnezia outputs, and Android remote subscription smoke plus focused Shadowsocks 2022 manifest fixture passed.

Released v0.1.23 through official GHCR and signed installer pipeline, fixed the public installer to invoke sibling scripts through bash so Windows-packed archives do not fail on lost executable bits, upgraded the real panel with upgrade.sh, reinstalled the real node-agent with public install-node.sh and the pinned v0.1.23 digest, and live-validated shadowsocks-v2ray-plugin through the real panel API, active subscription, and node-agent outbound.apply path. The command succeeded, TCP 18474 was externally reachable, the node runtime ran ssserver with v2ray-plugin and a concrete config, public renderers returned plugin fields for Happ, sing-box, Mihomo, Xray JSON, and Amnezia outputs, and Android remote subscription smoke against the real prod lumen-json passed.

Released v0.1.26 through official GHCR and signed installer pipeline, built simple-obfs v0.0.5 into the node-agent image, reinstalled the live node-agent through public install-node.sh with the pinned v0.1.26 digest, and live-validated shadowsocks-obfs through the real panel API, active subscription, and node-agent outbound.apply path. The command succeeded, TCP 18475 was externally reachable from the panel VPS, the node ran an obfs-server listener with the managed ssserver runtime, public renderers returned obfs-local plugin fields for Happ, sing-box, Mihomo, Xray JSON, Amnezia, and Lumen JSON outputs, and Android remote subscription smoke against the real prod lumen-json passed with --rerun-tasks.

Released v0.1.27 through official GHCR and signed public installer pipeline, upgraded the real panel, reinstalled the real node-agent through public install-node.sh with the pinned v0.1.27 digest, and live-validated naiveproxy through the real panel API, active subscription, and node-agent outbound.apply path. The command succeeded, TCP 18476 was externally reachable from the panel VPS, public renderers returned real credential-bearing Happ/raw, sing-box, Mihomo, and Lumen JSON outputs, Xray/Amnezia renderers did not emit fake unsupported Naive outbounds, and Android remote subscription smoke against the real prod lumen-json passed with --rerun-tasks.

Released v0.1.28 through official GHCR and signed public installer pipeline, upgraded the real panel, reinstalled the real node-agent through public install-node.sh with the pinned v0.1.28 digest, and live-validated VLESS transport variants through the real panel API, active subscription, and node-agent outbound.apply path. vless-reality-grpc, vless-reality-xhttp, vless-ws-tls, vless-grpc-tls, vless-httpupgrade-tls, and vless-ws all succeeded with external TCP reachability on ports 18477-18482 and matching Happ, Lumen JSON, Xray JSON, and Mihomo render evidence. vless-reality-httpupgrade is now blocked as non-live because Xray supports Reality only on raw TCP, XHTTP, and gRPC. Android remote subscription smoke against the real prod lumen-json passed with --no-daemon after clearing a Windows Gradle file lock.

Released v0.1.29 through official GHCR and signed public installer pipeline, upgraded the real panel, reinstalled the real node-agent through public install-node.sh with the pinned v0.1.29 digest, and live-validated real auth-provider settings. Settings and public login discovery now share backend/provider configuration: password active, passkey/WebAuthn active after enabling through the real settings API, Telegram/OAuth providers report needs_configuration when env secrets/client IDs are absent, generic_oauth2 remains unimplemented, enabling generic OAuth returns auth_provider_not_live, and enabling Telegram without env returns auth_provider_not_configured.

Closed the tools/request-history evidence gap on real prod without product-code rollout. Added a regression proving public subscription render events appear in user detail request_history, added a sanitized live smoke script, and live-validated the active real subscription through the public sub domain. Prod evidence: public Happ render returned 200, user detail contained subscription.public.rendered for the live user, HWID inspector included the live user, SRH inspector was renderable with subscription headers, HApp routing reported route_status=happ on an active node, and tools summary/session views were populated from live DB state.
